' ) ); foreach ( $demo_posts as $demo_post ) { if ( get_page_by_path( $demo_post['post_name'], OBJECT, $demo_post['post_type'] ) ) { continue; } $post_id = wp_insert_post( array_merge( $demo_post, array( 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_author' => 1 ) ) ); if ( $post_id && ! is_wp_error( $post_id ) ) { update_post_meta( $post_id, '_rsl_ie_preview_note', 'Created by the WordPress.org live preview blueprint.' ); if ( 'post' === $demo_post['post_type'] && $category_id ) { wp_set_post_categories( $post_id, array( $category_id ) ); } } }
